init.description: Define time-of-use tariff windows as YAML. Leave blank to disable per-tariff statistics.

data_description.tariffs:
Each entry needs: name (string), days (list of 0=Mon –6=Sun), start_hour, end_hour (0–24). Hours not matching any window fall into the 'default' tariff. Example:

- name: on-peak
  days: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4]
  start_hour: 14
  end_hour: 19
- name: off-peak
  days: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]
  start_hour: 0
  end_hour: 14

error.invalid_schema: Schema is invalid — each entry needs a name, days (0-6), start_hour, end_hour
error.bad_hours: start_hour must be less than end_hour, both within 0-24
